neuroim2 0.11.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • Changelog

Extract Data Values of an Object

Source: R/all_generic.R, R/clustered_neurovec.R, R/neurovol.R, and 1 more
values-methods.Rd

Extract Data Values of an Object

Usage

values(x, ...)

# S4 method for class 'ClusteredNeuroVec'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'DenseNeuroVol'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'SparseNeuroVol'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'ROIVol'
values(x, ...)

# S4 method for class 'ROIVec'
values(x, ...)

Arguments

x

the object to get values from

...

additional arguments

Value

A vector or array containing the values extracted from x.

Examples

x <- NeuroSpace(c(10,10,10), c(1,1,1))
vol <- NeuroVol(rnorm(10 * 10 * 10), x)
values(vol)
#> , , 1
#> 
#>              [,1]       [,2]       [,3]        [,4]       [,5]        [,6]
#>  [1,]  0.30424372  0.3189228 -0.5863496 -0.45684543 -1.4196592 -0.81844634
#>  [2,] -2.38788323  0.1181790 -1.3178815  0.33265718 -1.1861586 -0.01055408
#>  [3,] -0.20243207  1.9031875  0.0566593 -1.46267104 -0.8432326 -0.58250512
#>  [4,]  0.77100286 -0.6364255 -1.1870232 -1.27690906  0.2039978 -0.55703655
#>  [5,] -0.48709127  0.1317299 -0.7943120 -1.98171902  0.4947561  1.24261716
#>  [6,] -0.61156895 -0.5019950  0.4231244  0.03672268  1.2734087 -0.21652750
#>  [7,] -1.98345172  1.0524408 -0.5340800  0.32695702  0.7315775 -0.30849057
#>  [8,] -1.20928126 -1.1200575 -0.7629712  1.38713084 -0.2425568  0.28459403
#>  [9,] -1.17930794 -1.2506330 -0.1966203  2.31635613 -1.0411245 -0.92411829
#> [10,]  0.08956634  0.9188039  0.8545546 -1.61393130  2.1827732  0.36929484

#>              [,1]       [,2]         [,3]       [,4]        [,5]        [,6]
#>  [1,] -0.05149899  0.9450083 -0.022394581 -0.2860578 -0.64138906 -1.39512957

#>              [,7]        [,8]        [,9]      [,10]
#>  [1,]  0.36690129 -0.04112911 -0.93546087  1.0160790
#>  [2,]  0.44734409 -0.52126999  1.02770669 -0.7023873
#>  [3,] -1.68851481 -0.11901803 -0.43342204  1.0712819
#>  [4,] -2.00195688 -1.71903297 -1.71371491 -1.2332978
#>  [5,] -0.39782948  0.66145828 -0.56058505 -1.4997076
#>  [6,] -0.10339878 -0.33631164  1.57965346 -0.2504469
#>  [7,]  0.01717523 -1.27368091  1.39639083  0.2957783
#>  [8,]  0.40685410 -1.17239003 -0.03214849 -0.4918088
#>  [9,]  0.67627256  0.17861987 -0.69970097 -0.5381140
#> [10,] -0.28490701  0.05969443  0.06982377 -1.1733794
#> 
#> , , 10
#> 
#>              [,1]       [,2]        [,3]        [,4]          [,5]        [,6]
